summary: Task 03 wires the pg_stat_io TUI navigation (j/J keys, menuStatIO, statioNextView, help) by faithfully mirroring the databases/pgss/progress family idioms. The naming contract (stat_io / stat_io_time / statio / menuStatIO) is honored verbatim, cross-file consistency is verified end-to-end (keybinding token -> switchViewTo case -> statioNextView -> registered view names from Task 02), build is clean, go vet is clean, and all touched tests pass. The extended Test_switchViewTo cases and the new Test_statioNextView are legitimate, valuable coverage, not scope creep.

suggestions.suggestion: The shared-stats caveat enumerates 'pg_stat_io, bgwriter, wal' but the codebase resets neither these nor archiver/replslots via 'Q'. Consider 'shared stats such as pg_stat_io, bgwriter, wal' (already hedged with 'such as') or aligning the list with the exact set reset.go skips, to avoid the list reading as exhaustive. Cosmetic only.
suggestions.benefit: Avoids a user inferring the list is complete; keeps help text precise.

suggestions.suggestion: statioNextView is a pure copy of databasesNextView's 2-way-toggle shape (only the case labels differ). This is the established per-family idiom in this file (databases/statements/progress each have their own helper), so duplication is consistent with the codebase and not worth abstracting. Noted for awareness only.
suggestions.benefit: Confirms the duplication is intentional and idiomatic, not accidental.

positives: Naming contract adhered to exactly: view names stat_io / stat_io_time, switchViewTo token "statio", menu type menuStatIO — matches the databases-family three-way naming as specified by Decision 7.

menuStatIO menuSelect branch mirrors menuPgss precisely: cy 0 -> stat_io, cy 1 -> stat_io_time, default -> stat_io, followed by printCmdline(app.ui, "%s", app.config.view.Msg) — preserving the Decision 9 track_io_timing hint on switch.

j and J keys confirmed free (no prior sysstat binding); placed in the correct block alongside the existing lowercase-switch / uppercase-menu pairs. Generic 'menu' bindings (Esc/Up/Down/Enter) already drive menuStatIO; correctly left untouched.
menuOpen(menuStatIO, app.config, "") passes the empty pgssSchema correctly — the availability guard only fires for menuPgss, so no false NOTICE.

Cross-file consistency verified: the three new Test_switchViewTo cases resolve against view.New()'s real registered stat_io/stat_io_time views (Task 02, present on this branch), asserting v.Name == "stat_io"/"stat_io_time" — proving the token->view mapping is wired correctly, not just compiling.
viewSwitchHandler used directly (not switchViewToProcPidStat) — correct, since pg_stat_io has no runtime patches.
helpTemplate ASCII alignment preserved; the j,J line (86 chars) and the Q continuation line are consistent with neighboring lines.

verification.tests: go test ./top/... -run 'Test_selectMenuStyle|Test_statioNextView|Test_switchViewTo' — all PASS (Test_switchViewTo 25 cases incl. 3 new statio cases; Test_statioNextView 3 cases; Test_selectMenuStyle incl. {menuStatIO,2})
verification.naming_contract: verified stat_io / stat_io_time / statio / menuStatIO across keybindings.go, menu.go, config_view.go, view.go
